title: Crucial Pure
description: This is an alternate version of crucial that focuses less on quality of life and visuals but more on pure performance, squeezing every last ounce of it out of whatever you are gaming on!
body: Crucial Pure is the version of my other modpack Crucial that focuses purely on performance rather than quality of life and visuals. This modpack is pretty much designed to squeeze the most amount of performance possible out of your gaming rig!
